reviews.review_title: Why make it impossible from the start
reviews.review_description: And I thought I'd like this game after the intro then came the impossible wall well jumping climb wow after 1 hr can't get to the top cuzz rock steps are too far apart , jumps are weak with no momentum carrying u as u walk only with no sprint or real leaping ability WTH impossible about to quit for good senseless development of a game mechanics from the start it's impossible to jump certain stone steps then u fall way down only to fail again on stones waaaaaay too far apart lame needs to be fixed ASAP
I love the game very fun to play and scary very cool game sure any time

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much Jennifer for taking the time to share your positive feedback with us! We're thrilled to hear that you loved the game and found it both fun to play and scary. We always strive to create immersive and engaging experiences for our players, and we're glad to see that we hit the mark with you.
Your feedback means a lot to us and we hope that you continue to enjoy playing the game. If you have any suggestions or feedback, let us know. Thanks again for playing and sharing your thoughts with us!
